_comment: Hierarchical crafting category tree for the Crafting page sidebar. Each top-level entry is a collapsible GROUP; its `categories` are leaf filters matched case-insensitively against recipe.category. 'All' is rendered first by the page (not listed here). The sidebar is built entirely from this file (infinite-of-X) -- add groups + categories freely; for very large categories, split a recipe's category into finer values and group them here.
